overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 97 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 97 previously displayed items excluded, and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: The hidden pattern behind successful products | Mark Pincus (founder of Zynga)
items.summary_zh: 重点：Lenny's Podcast相关访谈/播客更新，核心议题是“The hidden pattern behind successful products | Mark Pincus (founder of Zynga)”，可用于跟踪 AI 高管判断、产业方向和产品趋势。
items.summary_en: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'The hidden pattern behind successful products | Mark Pincus (founder of Zynga)', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

items.title: After Orthogonality: Virtue-Ethical Agency and AI Alignment
items.summary_zh: 重点：Preface This essay argues that rational people don’t have goals, and that rational AIs shouldn’t have goals. Human actions are rational not because we direct them at some final ‘goals,’ but because we align actions to practices [1] : networks of actions, ac
items.summary_en: Focus: Preface This essay argues that rational people don’t have goals, and that rational AIs shouldn’t have goals. Human actions are rational not because we direct them at some final ‘goals,’ but because we align actions to practices [1] : networks of actions, action-dispositions, action-evaluation
